technology.title: Kaspersky suspects Chinese hackers planted a backdoor into Daemon Tools in ‘widespread’ attack
technology.summary: The cybersecurity company says it's seen thousands of infection attempts, and at least a dozen successful hacks after users installed malicious versions of the popular Windows software.

briefing.news_focus: The cybersecurity company says it's seen thousands of infection attempts, and at least a dozen successful hacks after users installed malicious versions of the popular Windows software.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Kaspersky指出，中國黑客可能在Daemon Tools這款廣泛使用的Windows軟體中植入後門，導致數千次感染嘗試和至少十幾次成功的駭客攻擊。這些攻擊發生在用戶安裝了惡意版本的Daemon Tools後，顯示出此事件的嚴重性。
briefing.background: Daemon Tools是一款流行的磁碟映像管理工具，廣泛應用於Windows系統中。隨著數位化進程的加速，供應鏈攻擊成為網路安全的一大威脅，黑客透過植入惡意軟體來侵入合法應用程式，進而影響大量用戶。Kaspersky的報告強調了供應鏈攻擊的普遍性及其潛在影響，特別是在使用者未能辨識惡意版本的情況下，這類攻擊的風險顯著增加。
briefing.analysis: Kaspersky的警告揭示了供應鏈攻擊的嚴重性，特別是針對廣泛使用的應用程式。根據參考報導，這次攻擊持續了一個月，並且建議Daemon Tools的用戶立即檢查其設備以尋找潛在的隱藏感染。各方利益關係中，使用者面臨安全風險，必須加強對軟體來源的辨識與防護；而開發商則需提升其安全性以防止未來的攻擊。Kaspersky和其他網路安全公司可能會因此加強對供應鏈安全的研究和防護措施，以應對日益增長的威脅。

supporting_titles: Widely used Daemon Tools disk app backdoored in monthlong supply-chain attack
supporting_summaries: Daemon Tools users: It's time to check your machines for stealthy infections, stat.

technology.title: Apple to pay up to $95 to some US iPhone buyers over AI lawsuit
technology.summary: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

briefing.news_focus: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 蘋果公司同意向部分美國iPhone買家支付最多95美元，以解決一項有關人工智慧的訴訟。該訴訟指控蘋果在廣告中誤導消費者，聲稱其Apple Intelligence功能未如預期提供。這項和解方案旨在補償那些因為這些誤導性宣傳而感到受騙的消費者。
briefing.background: 蘋果在過去幾年中大力推廣其人工智慧功能，尤其是Siri助手，並將其視為提升用戶體驗的重要元素。然而，隨著消費者對這些功能的期待增高，若其實際表現未能達到宣傳的標準，便可能引發法律訴訟。此次訴訟的背景是消費者對於蘋果在AI功能上的承諾感到失望，並認為公司未能如實告知其產品的實際能力，這在科技產業中並不罕見。
briefing.analysis: 此次和解的金額雖然相對較小，但卻反映出蘋果在消費者信任與品牌形象上的潛在風險。根據參考報導1，蘋果還同意支付2.5億美元以解決類似的集體訴訟，這顯示出公司在面對法律挑戰時的財務壓力。不同於主新聞的焦點，參考報導1強調了和解金額的具體數字及其對消費者的影響，這可能會引發更多消費者對於蘋果產品的關注與質疑。未來，蘋果可能需要更加謹慎地管理其產品宣傳，以避免類似的法律問題再次發生。

supporting_titles: Apple agrees to pay iPhone owners $250 million for not delivering AI Siri
supporting_summaries: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit that accused it of misleading customers about the availability of its Apple Intelligence features. The proposed settlement would apply to people in the US who purchased all models of the iPhone 16 and the iPhone 15 Pro between June 10th, 2024 and […]
In 1990, three former Apple employees launched a company that epitomized the Silicon Valley dream. What they invented looked like an iPhone—more than a decade earlier. The device never came to be.

technology.title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
technology.summary: QyTw0, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a sign of enduring tailwinds for AI, quantum computing, and sovereign tech, especially for Europe-made companies.

briefing.news_focus: QyTw0, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a sign of enduring tailwinds for AI, quantum computing, and sovereign tech, especially for Europe-made companies.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 芬蘭的人工智慧實驗室QuTwo，由前AMD Silo AI首席執行官Peter Sarlin創立，最近完成了一輪2500萬歐元（約合2900萬美元）的天使投資，該公司的估值達到3.25億歐元（約合3.8億美元）。這顯示出人工智慧、量子計算及主權科技在歐洲企業中的持續增長潛力。
briefing.background: QuTwo的成立背景與當前全球科技趨勢密切相關，尤其是在人工智慧和量子計算領域的快速發展。隨著各國政府對於科技主權的重視，越來越多的資金流入這些新興技術領域。歐洲在這方面的努力，尤其是在推動本土企業的發展上，顯示出其對於科技創新的重視。此輪投資不僅為QuTwo提供了資金支持，也反映出市場對於歐洲科技公司的信心。
briefing.analysis: QuTwo的成功融資顯示出市場對於人工智慧及量子計算技術的強勁需求，尤其是在歐洲市場。這一輪天使投資的完成，可能會吸引更多投資者關注類似的科技初創企業，進一步推動該領域的發展。各方利益關係中，投資者希望透過這些新興技術獲得回報，而創業公司則期望利用這些資金加速技術研發與市場擴展。未來，若QuTwo能夠持續在技術上取得突破，將可能引領更多歐洲企業進入這一競爭激烈的市場。

politics.title: Anxious Australia and jittery Japan deepen ‘quasi-alliance’ for an uneasy age
politics.summary: Japan’s prime minister touched down in Australia on Sunday with a set of shared anxieties – about Trump, China and the fragility of supply chains that the two insular nations have long relied upon – to which she sought some small relief. By the time she departed, Sanae Takaichi and Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese had signed an economic security pact, unlocked nearly US$1 billion in critical minerals funding and laid the groundwork for what observers describe as the most comprehensive...

briefing.news_focus: Japan’s prime minister touched down in Australia on Sunday with a set of shared anxieties – about Trump, China and the fragility of supply chains that the two insular nations have long relied upon – to which she sought some small relief. By the time she departed, Sanae Takaichi and Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese had signed an economic security pact, unlocked nearly US$1 billion in critical minerals funding and laid the groundwork for what observers describe as the most comprehensive...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 日本首相於週日抵達澳大利亞，雙方針對共同的焦慮進行會談，這些焦慮包括特朗普的影響、中國的崛起及供應鏈的脆弱性。會後，兩國簽署了一項經濟安全協議，釋放近10億美元的關鍵礦產資金，並為觀察家所稱的最全面的準同盟關係奠定基礎。
briefing.background: 澳大利亞與日本之間的關係在近年來因應地緣政治的變化而逐漸加深。隨著中國在亞太地區的影響力上升，兩國都對自身的經濟安全和供應鏈穩定性表達了擔憂。此外，特朗普政府的貿易政策及其對國際關係的影響，讓兩國在安全與經濟合作上尋求更緊密的聯繫。這次會議的成果顯示出兩國在面對共同挑戰時，願意加強合作以維護各自的利益。
briefing.analysis: 此次會議標誌著澳大利亞與日本在應對地緣政治挑戰上的進一步合作。雙方的經濟安全協議及資金釋放，顯示出他們對於確保關鍵資源供應的重視，尤其是在全球供應鏈面臨不確定性之際。日本對於特朗普及中國的擔憂，與澳大利亞的立場相呼應，顯示出兩國在安全政策上的一致性。未來，這樣的準同盟關係可能會進一步深化，尤其是在面對中國的影響力擴張及全球經濟不穩定的背景下。各方觀察者將密切關注這一合作是否能夠轉化為實質的戰略行動。

politics.title: China calls for Strait to be reopened 'as soon as possible' in Iran talks
politics.summary: Wang Yi is holding talks with Iran's foreign minister Aragchi who is on his first trip to China since the war began.

briefing.news_focus: Wang Yi is holding talks with Iran's foreign minister Aragchi who is on his first trip to China since the war began.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國外長王毅與伊朗外長阿巴斯·阿拉赫奇進行會談，這是阿拉赫奇自戰爭爆發以來首次訪問中國。會中，中方呼籲儘快重新開放霍爾木茲海峽，以促進人道援助的運送。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，近期因為伊朗與美國及以色列之間的緊張局勢，該地區的安全形勢惡化，導致運輸受阻。這一局勢不僅影響了石油價格，還使得人道援助的運送面臨挑戰，特別是對於急需食物、燃料和醫療物資的民眾。隨著戰爭的持續，國際社會對於開放人道走廊的呼聲日益高漲。
briefing.analysis: 各方在此事件中的利益關係顯著。中國希望通過促進人道援助來穩定地區局勢，並強化與伊朗的外交關係，這符合其在中東擴展影響力的戰略。伊朗則面臨內部壓力，急需外部援助以緩解民生困境。根據《衛報》的報導，非政府組織強調，霍爾木茲海峽的封鎖使得援助無法順利送達，這進一步加劇了人道危機。各方對於如何解決這一問題的看法可能存在差異，尤其是涉及到地緣政治的複雜性。

supporting_titles: Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi arrives in China for talks
Calls for humanitarian corridor through strait of Hormuz as Iran war hits vital aid
supporting_summaries: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has arrived in Beijing for talks with his Chinese counterpart, Wang Yi.

Soaring oil prices and the blockade are preventing food, fuel and medicine being delivered to millions of people in desperate need, say NGOs The volatility of global oil prices caused by the US and Israel’s war on Iran is taking a toll on the most vulnerable people, by slowing or blocking food and medical aid from reaching them. Now aid organisations are calling for a “humanitarian corridor” to be opened through the strait of Hormuz amid rocketing transportation costs. Continue reading...

politics.title: Iran says it wants a 'comprehensive agreement' with U.S.
politics.summary: “We will do our best to protect our legitimate rights and interests ⁠in the negotiations,” Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said in Beijing after a meeting with China’s top diplomat Wang Yi, Iranian media reported

briefing.news_focus: “We will do our best to protect our legitimate rights and interests ⁠in the negotiations,” Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said in Beijing after a meeting with China’s top diplomat Wang Yi, Iranian media reported
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗外長阿巴斯·阿拉克奇在北京會見中國外交部長王毅後表示，伊朗希望與美國達成一項「全面協議」，並強調將竭盡所能保護其在談判中的合法權益。這一表態顯示出伊朗在國際談判中的積極姿態。
briefing.background: 伊朗與美國的關係自2018年美國單方面退出核協議以來持續緊張。伊朗在此期間面臨嚴重的經濟制裁，並試圖通過外交途徑尋求緩解。中國作為伊朗的重要盟友，對於伊朗的外交努力具有關鍵影響。此次會議的背景是伊朗希望在全球政治中重新獲得合法性，並尋求與美國的對話以解決核問題及經濟困境。
briefing.analysis: 伊朗希望與美國達成全面協議的表態，顯示出其在面對國際壓力下的靈活外交策略。阿拉克奇強調保護合法權益，顯示出伊朗在談判中不會輕易妥協。參考報導補充了阿拉克奇抵達北京的背景，強調其與中國的外交互動，這可能表明伊朗在尋求與美國對話的同時，也在加強與中國的戰略合作。各方可能會對伊朗的提議持不同立場，美國可能會要求伊朗在核問題上做出更多讓步，而中國則可能支持伊朗的立場以維護其在中東的影響力。

supporting_titles: Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi arrives in China for talks
supporting_summaries: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has arrived in Beijing for talks with his Chinese counterpart, Wang Yi.

economy.title: Reinstate windfall tax on banks after surge in profits, TUC urges
economy.summary: Unions group wants rate returned from 3% to 8% after big four UK lenders reveal £14bn total profit in first quarter An increased windfall tax should be imposed on the UK’s largest banks according to trade union leaders, after the big four lenders reported almost £14bn in first-quarter profits, partly fuelled by market turbulence caused by the Iran war. The Trades Union Congress (TUC) renewed its call for an increase in the current bank surcharge, which was reduced from 8% to 3% of profits above £100m by the Conservative government in 2023, as banks benefit from the high interest rate environment. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Unions group wants rate returned from 3% to 8% after big four UK lenders reveal £14bn total profit in first quarter An increased windfall tax should be imposed on the UK’s largest banks according to trade union leaders, after the big four lenders reported almost £14bn in first-quarter profits, partly fuelled by market turbulence caused by the Iran war. The Trades Union Congress (TUC) renewed its call for an increase in the current bank surcharge, which was reduced from 8% to 3% of profits above £100m by the Conservative government in 2023, as banks benefit from the high interest rate environment. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國工會組織工會會議（TUC）呼籲政府重新提高對大型銀行的意外利潤稅率，從目前的3%恢復至8%。這一要求是在英國四大銀行報告顯示其第一季度總利潤達到140億英鎊的背景下提出的，這部分利潤受到伊朗戰爭引發的市場動盪影響。工會認為，銀行在高利率環境中獲利，應該承擔更高的稅負。
briefing.background: 2023年，英國保守黨政府將對銀行的意外利潤稅率從8%降低至3%。此舉旨在刺激銀行業的增長，但隨著市場環境的變化，特別是高利率的持續影響，銀行的利潤大幅上升。工會組織認為，這一稅率的降低使得銀行在經濟不穩定時期獲得了不成比例的利益，並且呼籲政府重新考慮該政策，以確保銀行對社會的貢獻與其獲利相符。
briefing.analysis: 工會的呼籲反映了對銀行業在當前經濟環境中獲利的擔憂，尤其是在高利率和市場波動的背景下。銀行的高利潤引發了社會對其責任的討論，工會希望透過提高稅率來促進社會公平。保守黨政府在稅率問題上的立場可能會面臨壓力，特別是在選舉臨近之際，選民對經濟不平等的關注可能會影響政策方向。若政府拒絕調整稅率，可能會引發工會及其他社會運動的進一步抗議，從而加劇政治緊張局勢。

economy.title: Trump and his oil-and-coal oligarchy should face sanctions for their war on the environment | Alexander Hurst
economy.summary: Europe punished Russian billionaires over the war in Ukraine. It should do the same to those abetting an ecocidal regime The ecological disasters of the US-Israel war with Iran are already bad enough . The noxious smoke from bombed oil facilities, spills in the Gulf’s waters, the contamination of farmland and groundwater with toxic chemicals unleashed by explosions and their debris, the millions of additional tons of CO 2 spewed into the atmosphere. But as bad as it is, the Iran war hides another conflict: the ecological war that Donald Trump’s US is waging against the rest of the world. When the EU and UK imposed individual sanctions, travel bans and asset seizures on Russian oligarchs, it wasn’t because most of them were individually responsible for Vladimir Putin’s colonial war of aggression against Ukraine. They were targeted because, as a class, they were viewed by many as inextricable from the apparatus of corruption and levers of power of the Russian state threatening global stability. Alexander Hurst writes for Guardian Europe from Paris. His memoir Generation Desperation is out now Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Europe punished Russian billionaires over the war in Ukraine. It should do the same to those abetting an ecocidal regime The ecological disasters of the US-Israel war with Iran are already bad enough . The noxious smoke from bombed oil facilities, spills in the Gulf’s waters, the contamination of farmland and groundwater with toxic chemicals unleashed by explosions and their debris, the millions of additional tons of CO 2 spewed into the atmosphere. But as bad as it is, the Iran war hides another conflict: the ecological war that Donald Trump’s US is waging against the rest of the world. When the EU and UK imposed individual sanctions, travel bans and asset seizures on Russian oligarchs, it wasn’t because most of them were individually responsible for Vladimir Putin’s colonial war of aggression against Ukraine. They were targeted because, as a class, they were viewed by many as inextricable from the apparatus of corruption and levers of power of the Russian state threatening global stability. Alexander Hurst writes for Guardian Europe from Paris. His memoir Generation Desperation is out now Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 本則新聞指出，隨著美國與伊朗之間的衝突加劇，生態災難的影響愈發嚴重，特別是來自被轟炸的石油設施所釋放的有毒煙霧及化學物質，對環境造成了重大損害。文章呼籲歐洲應該對支持美國環境破壞行為的利益集團，特別是唐納德·特朗普及其石油和煤炭寡頭，實施制裁，類似於對俄羅斯寡頭的制裁，以應對全球穩定的威脅。
briefing.background: 在當前的國際局勢中，美國與伊朗的緊張關係持續升級，導致多起生態災難，包括海灣地區的石油洩漏和農田污染。這些事件不僅影響當地生態系統，也對全球氣候變化造成進一步的壓力。與此同時，歐洲在面對俄烏戰爭時，已經對俄羅斯的寡頭實施了一系列制裁，這些制裁的目的在於削弱其對俄羅斯政府的支持，並促進全球穩定。文章認為，類似的制裁措施應該針對那些在美國環境政策中扮演重要角色的利益集團。
briefing.analysis: 各方對於特朗普及其支持的石油和煤炭利益集團的看法存在分歧。支持者認為這些企業是美國經濟的重要支柱，並且在能源獨立方面發揮了關鍵作用。反對者則指出，這些企業的行為對環境造成了不可逆轉的損害，並且應該承擔相應的責任。參考報導中提到的《經濟學人》指出，市場對於與特朗普相關的投資已經開始失去信心，這可能會進一步影響這些企業的未來發展。整體而言，隨著環境問題的日益嚴重，對於特朗普及其支持者的制裁呼聲可能會增強，並促使政策的改變。

supporting_titles: AI to power megadeals in global M&A despite Iran worries
Bye, bye to the Trump trades
supporting_summaries: Markets are calling time on many Donald-adjacent bets

economy.title: EU trade deal could force UK to restrict use of weedkiller linked to cancer
economy.summary: Glyphosate is currently sprayed on cereal and pulse crops to dessicate them and make them easier to harvest A new trade deal with the EU could lead to restrictions on the use of the controversial weedkiller glyphosate on UK food crops. The full-spectrum herbicide, which kills almost every plant it touches, is often sprayed on wheat, oats and other cereal and pulse crops shortly before harvest to desiccate them and make them easier to handle. Continue reading...

The full-spectrum herbicide, which kills almost every plant it touches, is often sprayed on wheat, oats and other cereal and pulse crops shortly before harvest to desiccate them and make them easier to handle. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據《衛報》報導，歐盟與英國之間的新貿易協議可能迫使英國限制使用與癌症相關的除草劑草甘膦。草甘膦目前被廣泛用於小麥、燕麥等穀物及豆類作物的收割前，以促進作物的乾燥和便於處理。此舉可能對英國農業產生重大影響，特別是在作物生產和農業政策方面。
briefing.background: 草甘膦是一種廣譜除草劑，因其有效性而被廣泛使用，但也因其潛在的健康風險而受到爭議。歐盟對草甘膦的使用有嚴格的規範，並在某些國家已經禁止其使用。隨著英國脫歐後的貿易政策調整，英國可能需要重新評估其農業標準，以符合與歐盟的貿易協議要求。這種情況下，英國農業部門的利益和消費者的健康考量將成為政策制定的關鍵因素。
briefing.analysis: 英國農業部門面臨著來自新貿易協議的壓力，可能需要在生產效率和消費者健康之間做出艱難的選擇。限制草甘膦的使用可能會提高生產成本，影響農民的收益，並可能導致作物產量下降。另一方面，消費者對食品安全的關注日益增加，這可能促使政府採取更嚴格的農業標準。不同利益方之間的角力將影響政策的最終走向，農業利益團體可能會強烈反對任何限制措施，而環保組織則會支持更嚴格的規範以保護公共健康。
